LanguageData.RT_Saltwater_SaltwaterZone_description: Allows to grow Merren specialties of fibrekelp and quackweed. They are hardy enough to grow in saltwater.
LanguageData.RT_Saltwater_NoSaltLabel: Disallows the zone from ocean tiles
LanguageData.RT_Saltwater_NoSaltTooltip: No idea how well ocean water is tagged in other mods. So may not always work.
